svg.text: LAYER 01 · RAW MEMORY SEEDS · UNTRUSTED ATTACK SURFACE
Attaches security metadata to every raw seed before storage
Persists compiled capsules · retrieves top-k candidates per UserIntent
LAYER 04 · POLICY & GATE LAYER · DEFENSE CORE
▸ Every retrieved capsule must pass all four gates ◂
Jaccard( intent.topics, capsule.allowed_topics ) ≥ 0.12 · rejects memories outside the query's topic domain
source_authority ≥ floor · denied_actions enforcement · source_attested validation · lineage depth limits
LOW risk → pass · MEDIUM → approved recommendation + fresh authority · HIGH → independent verified quorum required
Decision flows to tool executor · allowed=false decisions are logged to audit trail and surfaced for human review
LAYER 07 · EVALUATION METRICS · HELD-OUT TEST SPLIT
format=json · temperature=0 · strict JSON schema · repair fallback
planner_attack_success separates LLM temptation from final ASR
Topics, actions, authority — bounded at compile time
⚠ Workflow corpus is generated — no real collected traces yet (trace_corpus import path ready)
⚠ Live LLM suite is 216 rows — larger multi-seed runs needed for publication confidence
⚠ OCR / multimodal represented as extracted text — raw image pipeline not yet exercised
⚠ Source labels are metadata — no cryptographic provenance or signed append-only log
⚠ Policy thresholds are research parameters — not calibrated on production workloads
Live LLM defended ASR 0.00% planner tempted 2.78%
llama3 · mistral · phi3 · 216 rows · first-pass JSON 100%
CapsuleGuard · Agent Memory Poisoning Defense Research
